import React, { useEffect } from "react"; import { Leaf, Award, Cpu, Heart, Star, Cookie, CheckCircle2, } from "lucide-react"; import "./AboutUs2.css"; import { useNavigate } from "react-router-dom"; import { useTranslation } from "react-i18next"; const Hero = () => { const navigate = useNavigate(); const { t } = useTranslation(); return (
{t("about_hero_badge")}

{t("about_hero_title")}
{t("about_hero_highlight")}

{t("about_hero_desc")}

15 +

{t("about_stat_items")}

100 %

{t("about_stat_quality")}

{t("about_taste_unresistable")}
😋
); }; const StorySection = () => { const { t } = useTranslation(); return (

{t("about_story_title")}

{t("about_story_text1")}

{t("about_story_text2")}

{t("footer_rights")} 2023
); }; const QuoteSection = () => { const { t } = useTranslation(); return (

"{t("about_quote")}"

); }; const QualitySection = () => { const { t } = useTranslation(); const FEATURES_DATA = [ { title: t("about_feat1_title"), description: t("about_feat1_desc"), icon: , }, { title: t("about_feat2_title"), description: t("about_feat2_desc"), icon: , }, { title: t("about_feat3_title"), description: t("about_feat3_desc"), icon: , }, { title: t("about_feat4_title"), description: t("about_feat4_desc"), icon: , }, ]; return (

{t("about_quality_title")}{" "} {t("about_quality_highlight")}

{t("about_quality_desc")}

{FEATURES_DATA.map((feature, index) => (
{React.cloneElement(feature.icon, { className: "feature-icon", })}

{feature.title}

{feature.description}

))}
); }; export default function AboutUs() { const { i18n } = useTranslation(); useEffect(() => { // تحديث اتجاه الصفحة عند تغيير اللغة const direction = i18n.language === "ar" ? "rtl" : "ltr"; document.documentElement.dir = direction; document.documentElement.lang = i18n.language; }, [i18n.language]); return (
); }
